2606.14176.title: VeriGeo: Controllable Geometry Question Generation with Numerical and Analytical Verification
2606.14176.paper_summary: Geometry problem generation is useful for AI-assisted education and multimodal mathematical reasoning, but reliable synthesis remains difficult because the problem statement, diagram, constraints, and solution should be mutually consistent. Existing methods often trade off controllability and reliability: seed-based rewriting is flexible but weakly verifiable, whereas diagram-first construction improves validity but is less suited to arbitrary user-specified constraints. We introduce VeriGeo, a controllable geometry generation framework grounded in executable reasoning traces. Given user constraints such as target concepts and difficulty, an Author agent generates a problem and diagram, and a Solver agent produces a proof-aligned solution. Both agents use a shared action sequence that connects natural language, diagrams, geometric constraints, and proof steps into a verifiable representation. A three-stage pipeline checks numerical consistency, analytical realizability, and global consistency, using verification-guided reflection to repair recoverable failures and reject unrecoverable ones. Across five LLM backbones, raw generations frequently fail these checks, while VeriGeo repairs a substantial fraction of the invalid attempts. Supervised fine-tuning on 8.7k examples generated by VeriGeo achieves the best reported GeoQA performance among end-to-end multimodal LLM-based solvers, and obtains strong results on PGPS9K and MathVista-GPS, demonstrating the effectiveness of verified synthetic data for improving multimodal geometry reasoning.
2606.14176.paper_summary_zh: 幾何問題生成對於 AI 輔助教育和多模態數學推理非常有用，但由於問題陳述、圖示、約束和解決方案應該相互一致，因此可靠的合成仍然困難。現有的方法往往在可控性和可靠性之間進行取捨：基於種子的重寫靈活但驗證性較弱，而圖示優先的構建提高了有效性，但不太適合任意用戶指定的約束。我們介紹了 VeriGeo，一個基於可執行推理痕跡的可控幾何生成框架。根據用戶約束，如目標概念和難度，一個作者代理生成問題和圖示，而一個解決者代理則產生與證明對齊的解決方案。兩個代理使用共享的行動序列，將自然語言、圖示、幾何約束和證明步驟連接成可驗證的表示。一個三階段的管道檢查數值一致性、分析可實現性和全局一致性，使用驗證引導的反思來修復可恢復的失敗並拒絕不可恢復的失敗。在五個 LLM 主幹上，原始生成經常無法通過這些檢查，而 VeriGeo 修復了相當一部分無效的嘗試。對 VeriGeo 生成的 8.7k 範例進行的監督微調在端到端多模態 LLM 基礎的解決者中達到了最佳報告的 GeoQA 性能，並在 PGPS9K 和 MathVista-GPS 上取得了良好的結果，展示了經過驗證的合成數據在改善多模態幾何推理方面的有效性。
2606.14176.author: Xiaoxian Duan et.al.
2606.14176.authors: Xiaoxian Duan, Zequn Liu, Yingce Xia
